name: power2go-mono
description: Monorepo root for Power2Go EV Portal

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: BACKEND_PORT=5000 node backend/dist/server.js & npm run start --prefix frontend
